title: [T2.8] I/O Track Conformance and Performance Gates

conformance_contracts.title: Core AsyncRead trait semantics
conformance_contracts.runner: rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_io_conformance_gates ec_t2_io_01 -- --nocapture
conformance_contracts.pass_criteria: poll_read fills provided buffer from underlying source; returns Ready(Ok(n)) where n > 0 for non-empty source; returns Ready(Ok(0)) at EOF

conformance_contracts.title: Core AsyncWrite trait semantics
conformance_contracts.runner: rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_io_conformance_gates ec_t2_io_02 -- --nocapture
conformance_contracts.pass_criteria: poll_write accepts buffer and returns Ready(Ok(n)) with n > 0; poll_flush drains internal buffers; poll_shutdown performs graceful close

conformance_contracts.title: Copy operator transfer-to-EOF correctness
conformance_contracts.runner: rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_io_conformance_gates ec_t2_io_03 -- --nocapture
conformance_contracts.pass_criteria: copy() transfers all bytes from reader to writer until EOF; total bytes matches source length; writer receives all data in order

conformance_contracts.title: Split stream independence
conformance_contracts.runner: rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_io_conformance_gates ec_t2_io_04 -- --nocapture
conformance_contracts.pass_criteria: split() produces independent ReadHalf/WriteHalf; concurrent read/write operations do not interfere; dropping one half does not corrupt the other

conformance_contracts.title: Buffered I/O syscall reduction
conformance_contracts.runner: rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_io_conformance_gates ec_t2_io_05 -- --nocapture
conformance_contracts.pass_criteria: BufReader/BufWriter reduce underlying read/write call count vs unbuffered; lines() yields newline-delimited strings correctly

conformance_contracts.title: Codec decode/encode round-trip
conformance_contracts.runner: rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_io_conformance_gates ec_t2_io_06 -- --nocapture
conformance_contracts.pass_criteria: Decoder::decode() extracts complete frames from byte buffer; Encoder::encode() serializes items into byte buffer; round-trip preserves data fidelity

conformance_contracts.title: Framed duplex stream integration
conformance_contracts.runner: rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_io_conformance_gates ec_t2_io_07 -- --nocapture
conformance_contracts.pass_criteria: Framed wraps I/O stream with codec pair; back-pressure propagates from slow consumer to producer; no data corruption under pressure

conformance_contracts.title: Codec availability and compatibility
conformance_contracts.runner: rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_io_conformance_gates ec_t2_io_08 -- --nocapture
conformance_contracts.pass_criteria: LinesCodec, BytesCodec, and LengthDelimitedCodec are available and produce correct frames for representative inputs

conformance_contracts.title: Cancel-safety under conformance (integration with T2.5)
conformance_contracts.runner: rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_io_conformance_gates ec_t2_io_09 -- --nocapture
conformance_contracts.pass_criteria: All I/O operators are zero-task and zero-obligation on drop; buffer state preserved across cancel; no obligation leaks

conformance_contracts.title: Write-permit two-phase cancel-safe write
conformance_contracts.runner: rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_io_conformance_gates ec_t2_io_10 -- --nocapture
conformance_contracts.pass_criteria: write_permit provides reserve/commit semantics; dropping a permit aborts cleanly without data loss; committed writes are guaranteed delivered

alarm_rules.trigger: Any EC-T2-IO-* status = FAIL with failure_class in [cancel_protocol_violation, obligation_leak]
alarm_rules.gate_effect: hard-fail promotion for T2 track; escalate to T8 cross-track gate

alarm_rules.trigger: 3+ PB-IO-* decisions = WARN in same evaluation
alarm_rules.gate_effect: warning escalation; blocks release candidate promotion until reviewed
incident escalation; rerun required before promotion

gate_bindings.Gate-A: Functional parity and artifact schema validation

drift_detection.trigger: New I/O operator added to src/io/
drift_detection.action: Add conformance contract row EC-T2-IO-* and update test suite
Add codec contract row and round-trip test
Re-run baseline sourcing from DS-T2 suite
Document rationale in alarm_rules and update PB-IO-* row

drift_detection.trigger: Cancellation model changes for any I/O operator
drift_detection.action: Re-run EC-T2-IO-09 and update T2.5 proofs
